original_text:
### Tint Rules
- Campaign headline "D" and "M": **≈40% tint** of the headline color (Gold or Brand Blue colorway).
- Light Blue callout box: **70% tint**.
- Golden Sand callout box: **30% tint**.
- Wave top layers: **70% transparency**.
- No other ad-hoc tints — use palette values or these specified tints only.

relations.note: The no-ad-hoc-tints exclusivity backstops the specified approved tint levels.

quotes: Campaign headline "D" and "M": **≈40% tint** of the headline color (Gold or Brand Blue colorway).
Campaign headline "D" and "M": **≈40% tint** of the headline color (Gold or Brand Blue colorway).

rules.intent: Restrict tint usage to the specified, approved opacity levels per element.
rules.rule_text: Approved tint/transparency levels are locked: campaign headline tint letters "D" and "M" at ≈40% tint of the headline color (Gold or Brand Blue colorway); Light Blue callout box at 70% tint; Golden Sand callout box at 30% tint; and wave top layers at 70% transparency.

effect.reserved_for: palette values or the specified approved tints only
effect.subject: tint

quotes: No other ad-hoc tints — use palette values or these specified tints only.
No other ad-hoc tints — use palette values or these specified tints only.

rules.intent: Prevent unauthorized tint values outside the approved set.
rules.rule_text: No ad-hoc tints are permitted — only palette values or the specified approved tints (≈40% campaign headline, 70% Light Blue callout, 30% Golden Sand callout, 70% wave top layers) may be used.
